title: knautia collina subsp. longiflora
intro: Knautia collina subsp. longiflora, also known as long-flowered knawel, is a flowering plant species in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knautia collina subsp. longiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
